channel.title: Dictation Releases
channel.description: Sparkle update feed for Dictation — local-first macOS dictation + meeting recorder.

item.title: Parla 2.17
item.description: v2.17 fixes Check for Updates: (1) Menu bar item was silently failing because Parla runs as .accessory (LSUIElement) and Sparkle's dialogs need .regular to surface — invokeSparkleCheck now promotes to .regular and activates the app before invoking Sparkle, so the Update Available / Up to date dialogs actually appear. (2) Added a Settings → Startup → Updates section showing current version + a Check for Updates… button — same code path, alternate discovery point. After v2.17 you'll never need to run terminal install commands again.

item.title: Parla 2.16
item.description: v2.16 fixes: (1) Custom toggle shortcut: applyTogglePreset now persists ToggleConfig with the right mode when picker switches to Custom (was leaving stale .preset state); startToggleMode force-re-registers the Carbon hotkey and installs both chord + modifier-only paths if both are configured. (2) Settings window is now resizable. (3) Live Captions window is now resizable (drag bottom-right corner) — your size is saved per display alongside position; min 320×72, max 1200×480. (4) Sparkle: verified Check for Updates is the correct one-click path from now on, no more terminal commands needed.

item.title: Parla 2.15
item.description: Bug fixes + Settings redesign: (1) Custom toggle shortcut works again — startToggleMode now uses what's actually configured (chord vs modifier-only), not the saved mode (which could go stale when picker switched preset→custom). (2) Removed auto-Finder reveal after meeting saves — notification + Recent Meetings menu still surface the file. (3) Live Captions window no longer grows over time — locked NSHostingView size, added ScrollView with auto-scroll-to-bottom, buffer raised to 200 lines for scrollback. (4) Settings redesigned to match Claude Design sidebar layout (220pt sidebar, GENERAL/CAPTURE/SYSTEM groups, parlaAmber selection tint). (5) MeetingBrowser summary now renders Markdown (**bold**, *italic*) instead of showing raw syntax.

item.title: Parla 2.14
item.description: Design handoff fidelity pass — fixes from spec audit: menu-bar icons now 16pt (was 18); HUD idle breath corrected to scale 0.92↔1.0 + opacity 0.65↔1; HUD recording adds outward fade for the ripple feel; past caption lines fade to 35% (current speaker full weight); 0.4s easeOut fade between onboarding screens; preferences section icons bumped to 18pt and use .primary foreground.

item.title: Parla 2.13
item.description: Design integration: bundled menu-bar icons, breathing HUD glyph (no text, screen-recording-invisible), liquid-glass live captions (460pt, ultra-thin material), onboarding illustrations per step, monoline section icons in Preferences.

item.title: Dictation 2.11.1
item.description: Performance fix: drops peak unified memory footprint dramatically. Calls MLX.GPU.clearCache() after every Gemma generation, in reset(), and between map-reduce summary chunks. Adds IdleReclaimer that automatically frees the loaded Gemma model after 5 min of idleness (configurable in Preferences → Cleanup → Free cleanup model after [N] minutes idle). Targets the 17.4 GB peak found in the v2.10 perf audit.

item.title: Dictation 2.11
item.description: Initial Sparkle release. Includes everything through v2.11: context-aware cleanup, Meeting Browser (⌘B), calendar integration with meeting-app detection, live captions floating window with translation toggle, and all bug fixes from v2.5–v2.10.
